hero.title: Your Journey to the Skies.
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know before the alarm clock rings
hero.description: The most sublime moments begin before the world awakes. To ensure your arrival at our private launch site is seamless and professional, we have provided this operational briefing. From transportation timing to meeting points, we manage the precision so you can enjoy the serenity.

sunriseRitual.label: The Science of Flight
sunriseRitual.title: Why We Fly at Dawn.
sunriseRitual.description: A hot air balloon is a precision aircraft that navigates within the air mass rather than resisting it. To achieve this with absolute safety, we require a stable atmosphere. This meteorological phenomenon thermal inversion occurs exclusively during the first light of day. As the sun warms the terrain, thermal currents create atmospheric turbulence, making flight conditions unsuitable for ballooning. We do not schedule our ascents at dawn merely for the aesthetic; we do so to uphold the highest standards of aeronautical safety and operational stability.

gettingHere.label: Arrival & Directions
gettingHere.title:
Your Gateway 
 to the Valley.
gettingHere.description: Located in the heart of the Teotihuacán Valley, our private launch site is easily accessible from Mexico City and surrounding areas. Precision in your arrival ensures excellence in your flight.

shuttle.cardBody: If you booked a package with transport, our van picks you up directly from your hotel or Airbnb in designated zones (Reforma, Polanco, Centro, Roma/Condesa).
shuttle.perks: The Perks: AC, seatbelts, and a nap on the way back.

selfDrive.cardBody: If you have your own vehicle, the drive takes about 45-60 minutes from central CDMX (traffic is non-existent at this hour).
selfDrive.parking: Parking: We offer secure, enclosed parking on-site at no extra cost. Your car is safe while you are in the clouds.
selfDrive.disclaimer: Do not guess. Use this Waze/Google Maps link directly to our Globoport.

weatherPolicy.label: WEATHER POLICY
weatherPolicy.title:
Operational Integrity:
 Our Flight Guarantee.
weatherPolicy.description:
We maintain the most rigorous safety protocols in the industry. If meteorological conditions do not meet our exacting standards, we simply do not fly. Our commitment is to your safety above all else.
 
 Should a flight be cancelled due to weather, we offer seamless rescheduling or a full refund. We prioritise your peace of mind as much as your protection

companyCancellation.title: If We Cancel (Bad Weather):
companyCancellation.description: You get a 100% Refund or a free reschedule for the next available date. No hidden fees, no arguments.

24to48.label: 24 hours
24to48.description: Non-refundable (The logistics and perishable breakfast are already in motion)

onionStrategy.title: The Onion Strategy
onionStrategy.description: It is crisp (and sometimes cold) at 6:00 AM, but by the time we land and have breakfast, the Mexican sun is warm. Wear layers. A jacket you can remove is your best friend.

footwear.title: Footwear
footwear.description: We launch from fields, not runways. Wear comfortable, closed-toe shoes (sneakers or boots).

luggage.title: Luggage
luggage.description: Please bring only small backpacks. Large suitcases can be stored securely at our reception, but they cannot fly in the basket due to weight and space.

afraidHeights.question: I am afraid of heights. Will I get dizzy?
afraidHeights.answer: Surprisingly, no. Vertigo usually comes from a connection to the ground. In a balloon, you are detached. The motion is so stable you could balance a coin on its edge. Most nervous flyers are smiling within 2 minutes.

restrooms.question: Are there restrooms?
restrooms.answer: Surprisingly, no. Vertigo usually comes from a connection to the ground. In a balloon, you are detached. The motion is so stable you could balance a coin on its edge. Most nervous flyers are smiling within 2 minutes.

weightLimit.answer: Surprisingly, no. Vertigo usually comes from a connection to the ground. In a balloon, you are detached. The motion is so stable you could balance a coin on its edge. Most nervous flyers are smiling within 2 minutes.

bringCamera.question: Can I bring a camera?
bringCamera.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring a camera. We recommend a camera with a wide-angle lens to capture the beautiful views.

breakfast.question: What is the breakfast like?
breakfast.answer: We serve a traditional Mexican breakfast with fresh fruit, coffee, and a light meal.
